how_to_contribute.process: Fork the repository, create a feature branch, submit a pull request.
good_first_issues: Add an exercise for speculative decoding (Chapter 6)
Translate Chapter 1 to Spanish or Hindi
Add a chapter section on Mixture of Experts architecture
Create the RAGAS evaluation test for Chapter 5 exercise
Write the property-based test generator for BPE (assets/tests/fuzz-gen.py)
